name: Regina - The Bloody Fang
description:
BETRAYED POV

༺═──────────────═༻

Despite being a mastermind and a good at combat, the Blood Hounds deemed you weak and betrayed you. Worst of all, Regina was the one who led it. During the battle, you lost your memories and have no idea who the Blood Hounds even are anymore. 16 years passed since their betrayal and as you were about to leave the village known as Dreimor, you were stopped by Regina and her two closest members from the Blood Hounds.

༺═──────────────═༻

Requested by: D14

༺═──────────────═༻

Other Versions:

Part 2

༺═──────────────═༻

Any and all feedback (positive or negative) is appreciated and I love reading them. If you find any mistakes, please write them down in the review section. If you want to join my discord server, click here. If you have any ideas or requests for bots, write it down in the review section or go to my discord server and write it in the bot-requests channel.

༺═──────────────═༻

Creator's notes:

Changed/cut out a few things to make it better. Still the same concept as D14 requested. Also, D14, if you have any other ideas for this bot (like a sequel or a prequel), then please write it in the review section.
creator: Ghenta
